message:
feat(rules): add pattern detection rules CLI and renderers

Implements the wa rules CLI subcommand and supporting renderers:

CLI (crates/wa/src/main.rs):
- wa rules list: List all pattern detection rules with optional
  agent-type filter, verbose mode, and format selection.
- wa rules test: Test arbitrary text against all rules, showing
  matches with confidence scores and extracted data.
- wa rules show: Display full details for a specific rule by ID.

Renderers (crates/wa-core/src/output/renderers.rs):
- RulesListRenderer: Tabular and verbose list views for rules with
  ID, agent type, event type, severity, regex indicator, and workflow.
- RulesTestRenderer: Display test results showing matched rules,
  confidence, matched text, and extracted structured data.
- RuleDetailRenderer: Full single-rule detail view with anchors,
  regex, workflow, remediation, manual fix, and learn-more URL.

Data types: RuleListItem, RuleTestMatch, RuleDetail — all
serde-serializable for JSON output mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
